step.title: Error occurred
step.text: Log() at /tmp/KuduLite/Kudu.Core/Deployment/StructuredTextLogger.cs:70: Could not find a part of the path '/home/site/deployments/49e6f620-e9f9-4061-80fc-c32643011293/log.log'.
